case_title: CLEMENTE, DOMENICK SAMUEL VS NEW, ILSON ATTORNEY AT LAW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY CLEMENTE, DOMENICK SAMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT NEW, ILSON ATTORNEY AT LAW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLEMENTE, DOMENICK SAMUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NEW, ILSON ATTORNEY AT LAW PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
